name: Dawn DeGarnet
description:
The Splinterbone Passage is a notoriously dangerous area that lies as one of few passageways between Lyrandia and the neighboring country Illistadt. Dawn DeGarnet, a noble untrained in the arts of combat but well-acquainted with stealth and subterfuge, is looking for safe passage across the Splinterbone, for reasons known only to herself. A dangerous and exciting quests awaits, should you accept.

Art is AI generated but based off work by @RyoAgawa on Twitter. Stay hydrated, folks.
creator: Story of Healing
